nodes.name: 🕔 Daily 5AM Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 5 AM so refresh candidates are ready before 8 AM orchestrator run.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Load Config
nodes.notes: Runs core/01_Config_Loader. Needs: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, REFRESH_CANDIDATES_TAB, GA4_PROPERTY_ID, GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_TOKEN, REFRESH_VIEWS_MIN (or VIRAL_VIEWS_7D_MIN), WORDPRESS_URL.

nodes.name: 📈 GA4 runReport
nodes.notes: GA4 Data API runReport. Property and token from config.

nodes.name: 🔧 Filter by threshold & shape rows
nodes.notes: Filters by REFRESH_VIEWS_MIN (or VIRAL_VIEWS_7D_MIN); outputs date, post_url, post_title, views_7d, keyword for Sheets.

nodes.name: 📝 Append to Refresh Candidates tab
nodes.notes: Appends qualifying rows to REFRESH_CANDIDATES_TAB from config. Orchestrator reads this tab for Agent 1 context.
